## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use case

Describe the research or workflow context where this feature would be useful.

## Proposed solution

If you have ideas about implementation, describe them here.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Related Java Maxent feature

If this relates to a Java Maxent capability, specify the version and settings.
